selection_likelihood:
Medium-High - strong financial services data background   
  across regulated environments with demonstrable multi-client delivery at Wherescape  
  that maps directly to consulting engagement experience, backed by Python/SQL         
  technical depth.

skills.Databases:
CosmosDB, MSSQL, NoSQL, SnowSQL, kdb+, SQL Server, Aurora
  PostgreSQL
skills.Cloud Platforms:
AWS (S3, EC2, EMR, EMR Serverless, Glue, Lambda, Redshift),
  Snowflake, Azure (Data Factory, Databricks, Synapse), GCP, Terraform
skills.Data Engineering Tools:
DBT, PySpark, Kafka, Data Vault 2.0, CDC, ELT, Looker,
   Looker API, Apache Airflow (DAGs), Fivetran, Apache Iceberg, **Power BI**, MLOps,
  Model Deployment Pipelines, Model Registry, Experiment Tracking, Model Versioning
skills.CI/CD:
Git, GitHub Actions, CI/CD Pipelines, Azure Function, Agile/Scrum,
  Automated Testing, pytest, L3 Support
skills.Data techniques:
ETL, ELT, **Requirements Analysis**, **Data Governance**,
  **Regulatory Compliance**, Data Modelling, Physical Modelling, Data Ingestion, Data
  Migration, Streaming, Data Warehousing, Data Analysis, CDC, Reconciliation, Semantic
  Layers, Rules Engines, Observability, Self-Service Analytics, Near-Real-Time
  Inference, Feature Drift Monitoring, Model Rollback

Build A Rocket Boy:
Delivered **data modernisation** initiatives translating complex **business
  requirements** into scalable **Python**-based **ELT** pipelines with **DBT** semantic
   layers, integrating 100+ source systems processing 120+ TB of financial data.

Led end-to-end **data transformation** establishing **ELT** pipelines and
  **CI/CD** workflows, engaging cross-functional stakeholders to define requirements
  and delivering **pytest**-tested solutions cutting deployment failures by 40%.

Advised on **AI adoption** strategy by deploying Gen AI model pipelines on
  **Apache Iceberg** using **MLOps** best practices, identifying realistic use cases
  and aligning them to the existing data landscape for production workloads.

Built **observability** frameworks across 50+ production jobs, using
  **Python** and **SQL** to validate outputs and create compelling visualisations for
  both business and technical stakeholder decision-making.
Operated as embedded data consultant in **capital markets**, translating
  trading desk requirements into **ELT** pipelines across **Snowflake** and
  **AWS/Azure**, supporting 5+ business functions including settlements and risk.

Gathered and structured requirements for **regulatory** reporting workstreams
  (**REMIT**, **EMIR**), translating compliance mandates into governed **data models**
  with full lineage and auditability for front-office and risk teams.

Used **Python** and **SQL** to build **data quality** validation frameworks
  and **Power BI** dashboards, delivering actionable insights into P&L and trade
  settlements for front-office and risk stakeholders.

Owned workstream delivery end-to-end including **L3 support** and technical
  documentation, communicating clearly to non-technical stakeholders and mentoring 3
  junior engineers to resolve production incidents within SLA.
Sodexo:
Delivered **data modernisation** for AMETA region as engineering lead,
  translating **business requirements** into **CDC**-based **ELT** pipelines using
  **Azure Data Factory** and **Databricks**, reducing operational costs by 80%.

Reported to CTO as engineering lead, gathering and structuring requirements
  from 10+ stakeholder groups and translating them into a fintech **self-service
  analytics** platform processing 1M+ daily transactions.

Took ownership of **data transformation** workstreams using **Agile/Scrum**
  and **Azure Data Factory**, managing cross-functional delivery and communicating
  progress to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

Mentored 4 junior developers and led **Data Vault 2.0** physical modelling
  with **data governance** and rules-engine **data quality** controls, reducing
  redundancy by 40% and accelerating SDLC delivery cycles.
Wherescape USA:
Delivered **client-facing** **data modernisation** engagements for British
  American Tobacco, implementing **data migration** scripts and **Azure Synapse**
  migration with **pytest** testing suites achieving 99.9% SLA compliance.

Translated **client** business requirements into **Snowflake** external tables
   and **ELT** analytics pipelines on **AWS S3**, using **Python** and **SQL** to
  validate outputs and automating deployments via **GitHub Actions** **CI/CD**.

Managed **data transformation** workstreams for AMD Malaysia across
  **Agile/Scrum** delivery, using **SQL** to build Oracle-to-**SQL Server**
  transformations and an incremental **ELT** pipeline loading 1B+ records with 80%
  efficiency gain.

Owned **requirements gathering**, solution design, and delivery across 10+
  concurrent **client** data engineering engagements, enforcing **data governance**
  standards and **CI/CD** best practices that reduced production defects by 45%.
